# NIP-99 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-99 defines `kind:30402` for classified listings and `kind:30403` for draft/inactive listings. Required tags include `"title"`, `"summary"`, `"published_at"`, `"location"`, and `"price"`. Optional tags include `"status"` and `"g"` for geohash. The `.content` field should be a Markdown string describing the listing. Filter patterns can include `#t` for tags, `#title`, `#summary`, `#location`, and `#price`. JSON examples include `["price", "<number>", "<currency>", "<frequenc
